contentPattern.structure: full-bleed editorial background image + publication-date eyebrow + article title on a light title plate (no CTA, no portrait)

suitableFor: editorial article heroes pairing a background photo with a date eyebrow and title
any article-header treatment with a title plate and no call-to-action button
notSuitableFor: marketing landing-page heroes with an overlaid title and CTA on a dark band (use hero-banner)
person / attorney profile headers with a portrait (use hero-profile)
